title: cyperus globosus subsp. humifusus
intro: Cyperus globosus subsp. humifusus is a subspecies of the Cyperus globosus plant, commonly known as the globe sedge, which is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Cyperus globosus subsp. humifusus is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water, and can also be used in traditional herbal remedies such as tinctures and ointments.
